questionText: Describe the protocol through which methane leak detection and repair or other methane leak detection methods are conducted for your coal mining activities, including predominant frequency of inspections, estimates of assets covered, and methodologies employed.
questionKo: 프로토콜 기타 방법 석탄 광업 활동, 포함 빈도, 자산, 방법론.
simpleHelp: Investors are interested in how organizations approach methane leak detection and repair (LDAR), or other methane leak detection methods, in order to gauge how effectively methane emissions are being reduced. This question provides information to data users with further information on the methods used to detect methane leaks.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to 7.60.
guidance.textKo: 이 문항 only appears 만약 귀사 선택 "예" response 7.60.

guidance.text:
General 
Describe, providing a company-specific description and using examples, the frequency, the methodology, and the scope of your LDAR programs or other methane leak detection methods you employ.
- 
Frequency
refers to how often a company observes its assets for leaks (e.g. monthly, quarterly, annually). 
- 
Methodology
is the process that the company uses to detect methane leaks, for example;
- Optimal gas imaging (OGI) cameras 
- Handheld "sniffer" gas detectors 
- Infrared thermal imaging (FLIR0 camera) 
- Drone-based monitors 
- Predictive analytics 
- Audio, Visual, Olfactory (AVO) inspections 
- US EPA's Method 21 
- Canadian Council of Ministers of Environment (CCME) Environmental Code of Practice for Measurement and Control of Fugitive VOC Emissions from Equipment Leaks (Oct 1993)
- 
Scope
is the percentage of the company's assets that are inspected under an LDAR or other methane leak detection program.
guidance.textKo: 일반 설명, providing comp하나 이상-specific description 및 using examples, 빈도, 방법론, 및 scope 의 귀사의 LDAR programs 또는 기타 methane leak detection methods 귀사 employ. - 빈도 refers how often comp하나 이상 observes its assets leaks (e.g. monthly, quarterly, 매년). - 방법론 프로세스 comp하나 이상 uses detect methane leaks, example; - Optimal gas imaging (OGI) cameras - Handheld "sniffer" gas detectors - Infrared thermal imaging (FLIR0 camera) - Drone-based monitors - Predictive analytics - Audio, Visual, Olfactory (AVO) inspections - US EPA's Method 21 - Canadian Council 의 Ministers 의 Environment (CCME) 환경 Code 의 Practice Measurement 및 Control 의 Fugitive VOC 배출량 에서 Equipment Leaks (Oct 1993) - Scope percentage 의 comp하나 이상's assets inspected under LDAR 또는 기타 methane leak detection program.

criteria.criteria:
Text answer provided - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 텍스트 입력 answer 제공된 - 2 점 이 문항에서 최대 2/2점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points
ROUTE A)
'Yes' selected in question 7.60 - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, this is not relevant to our operations' in question 7.60 - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: Full 공시 점수수수 해야 합니다 부여됨 대상 관리 점수수수 경로) '예' 선택됨 문항 7.60 - 1 점 이 경로에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다. 또는 경로 B) '아니요, 이 관련 없음 당사의 operations' 문항 7.60 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 최대 0/0점을 받을 수 있습니다.
